title: Promote dynamic-types spec and export FFI traceability

source.subject: feat(v0.3): bump compiler, promote dynamic-types spec, export FFI traceability

body:
## What shipped

Superrepo commit promotes dynamic-types platform-spec material and ties export FFI traceability to the integrated compiler tip.

## Source commit
